title: thymus serpyllum subsp. pannonicus
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. pannonicus, also known as the Pannonic thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. pannonicus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Thymus serpyllum subsp. pannonicus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in aromatherapy and as a culinary herb.
